name: Cantal (France)
description: A green field bearing a red pavilion (mantling) draped from three gold rings, enclosing a blue shield charged with a gold bend and six white scallop shells.
history: The blue shield with bend and scallops is the historic arms of the Duchy of Auvergne, of which Cantal was part.

features.role: blue shield with a gold bend and six white scallop shells, within a red pavilion
six white scallop shells flanking the gold bend
